summary: BLOCK OAuth Configuration Fix & Daily Prompts Image Proxy Hard-Fix - All tests passed. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All verified - carousel uses proxy URLs with loading='eager' for first 3 slides.

issues: Minor React warning: nested <a> tags in carousel (Link inside Link) - not blocking functionality

backend: POST /api/admin/oauth-status requires admin auth (401/403 without token)
POST /api/admin/oauth-status returns consumer_key_status with partial key preview (foBI...xxxx)
POST /api/admin/oauth-status handshake_test starts with SUCCESS (request_token obtained)
GET /api/image-proxy returns 200 with image data and proper content-type
GET /api/image-proxy returns X-Cache: MISS on first request
GET /api/image-proxy returns X-Cache: HIT-MEM on cached request
Startup log contains: Discogs OAuth configured: KEY=foBI... SECRET=****
frontend: First 3 slides use direct tags (not AlbumArt component)
loading='eager' attribute present on first slide img
fetchpriority='high' attribute present on first slide img
decoding='sync' attribute present on first slide img

context_for_next_testing_agent: OAuth status endpoint at /api/admin/oauth-status works correctly - returns both_configured=true and handshake_test=SUCCESS. Image proxy at /api/image-proxy caches images with X-Cache headers (MISS on first call, HIT-MEM on cached). Daily prompts responses at /api/prompts/{id}/responses include proxy_cover_url field. Frontend carousel uses direct img tags with loading='eager', fetchpriority='high', decoding='sync' for first 3 slides. Minor console warning about nested <a> tags in carousel - not blocking.
